headline: Daymond John: Consumer shopping habits are 'changing'
summary: Shark Group CEO Daymond John joins Market Domination host Josh Lipton to discuss how consumer behavior is evolving, how shoppers are prioritizing experiences over goods, and how discount retailers and live selling platforms like TikTok Shop are gaining traction. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

content.title: Daymond John: Consumer shopping habits are 'changing'
content.description:
Shark Group CEO Daymond John joins Market Domination host Josh Lipton to discuss how consumer behavior is evolving, how shoppers are prioritizing experiences over goods, and how discount retailers and live selling platforms like TikTok Shop are gaining traction.

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
